name: deepseek-llm-vertical-slice
title: Implement DeepSeek LLM vertical slice
description: Implement the first external integration vertical slice with DeepSeek. Use DB-managed channel/model/credential/policy configuration, backend/admin-only model selection, DeepSeek OpenAI-compatible adapter, LLM ports for structured/final/streaming calls, invocation recording, and a minimal text multi-dimension summary usecase.
creator: codex
